Frequently Asked Questions
What is Magic Hour?
Magic Hour is a free online AI video generator and AI image editor that helps creators, marketers, and developers produce professional-quality content in seconds. With 100+ AI-powered tools, including face swap, image-to-video, AI image editor, lip sync, and more. You can create studio-grade videos and images entirely in your browser.
Is Magic Hour free to use?
Yes. Magic Hour offers free daily credits that let you create AI videos and edit images at no cost. You can access popular tools like face swap, AI image editor, lip sync, talking photo, AI GIF generator, and AI image upscaler without a credit card. Paid plans are available for creators and teams who need higher volume or premium features.
How does the AI video generator work?
Magic Hour's AI video generator supports multiple workflows: type a text prompt to generate a video from scratch (text-to-video), upload a photo to animate it (image-to-video), restyle existing footage (video-to-video), or create stop-motion animations. Each tool runs entirely in your browser and most videos are ready within seconds.
Can I generate images with AI on Magic Hour?
Absolutely. Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts across a wide range of styles: photorealistic, illustration, anime, concept art, and more. You can also use the AI image editor to modify existing images using natural-language instructions.
How does the face swap video tool work?
Magic Hour's AI face swap lets you replace a face in any video with another face using just a single reference photo. The AI automatically handles alignment, skin tone matching, lighting, and expression tracking to produce realistic results. You can also swap faces in photos, GIFs, and multi-person group shots, all for free.
What AI tools does Magic Hour offer beyond video and image generation?
Beyond the AI video generator and AI image generator, Magic Hour includes: lip sync (sync any video with audio), talking photo (make still images speak), AI headshot generator, AI image upscaler, AI clothes changer, AI GIF generator, voice cloner, voice generator, and more: over 100 tools in total.
Does Magic Hour have an API for developers?
Yes. Magic Hour provides a REST API with official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust. You can programmatically generate videos, images, and audio, from face swaps and text-to-video to image upscaling and voice cloning. Usage-based pricing and a 99.9% uptime SLA make it production-ready at any scale.
Do I need to download any software to use Magic Hour?
No. Magic Hour runs entirely in your web browser. There is nothing to install or configure. Sign up, choose a tool, and start creating immediately. Your projects are saved in the cloud, so you can access them from any device.
What makes Magic Hour different from other AI video generators?
Magic Hour combines over 100 AI video, image, and audio tools in one unified platform. Most competitors offer only a handful. It's trusted by 3M+ creators and 2K+ teams, backed by Y Combinator, and used by businesses worldwide. With free daily credits, browser-based access, 10,000+ templates, and a production-ready API, Magic Hour is built for both casual creators and enterprise workflows.
Can I use Magic Hour for commercial projects?
Yes. Content you create with Magic Hour can be used in commercial projects, marketing campaigns, social media, advertisements, and more. Paid plans provide additional credits and premium features for professional and team use.
How does the AI image generator work?
Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts using state-of-the-art diffusion models. Describe what you want: a product photo, character illustration, social media graphic, or abstract artwork. The AI produces it in seconds. Choose from 400+ styles including photorealistic, anime, and concept art.
What is the best free AI photo editor online?
Magic Hour offers a free AI photo editor that lets you edit images using natural-language prompts instead of complex menus. Remove objects, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, enhance skin detail, or add creative effects. It works on any device in your browser, requires no sign up to try, and is trusted by 3M+ creators worldwide.
Can I create AI videos from text prompts on Magic Hour?
Yes. Magic Hour's text-to-video AI generator converts written scene descriptions into polished video clips. Type a prompt and the AI produces a video in seconds. Beyond text-to-video, Magic Hour also supports image-to-video, face swap video, lip sync, and 100+ other AI video tools, all free to try with daily credits.

Frequently Asked Questions
Are my generations private?

Yes, your generations are private from other users and Magic Hour. We will never access any of your assets without your explicit permission. You have the option to delete the generated asset after completion from our system. Make sure to download it first if you'd like to keep it, as it's deleted forever.

Assets that you upload to our platform, including images, audio, and videos are also private and are deleted within one week.

Can I use my plan for API access?
Yes, we offer API access for all users, with the same features and usage levels in your plan. Check out our API Documentation to learn more. If you need any help with implementation or have questions, please reach out to us on live chat or email us at support@magichour.ai. Our team is happy to assist you with your specific needs.
Do I own the assets I create?

Yes, you retain full ownership, including copyright and intellectual property rights, for all assets you generate. However, only paid users are granted commercial usage rights.

Free users may use generated content for personal, non-commercial purposes only.

Can I get a refund?
We offer a one-time refund if your purchase was made within the past 7 days and you have used fewer than 500 credits from the plan you purchased. Credits from free sign-up credits do not count toward this limit. If you have an issue with the product, please contact us in live chat or email us at support@magichour.ai, and we'd be happy to help you find a solution.
Do I need to enter a credit card to try Magic Hour?
No, Magic Hour's Free plan allows you to try our basic features for free. If you'd like to use features not included in the Free plan, or get more credits after you've run out, you can upgrade to a paid plan or purchase more credits.
Do credits roll over to the next month?
Yes, any unused credits in your balance will roll over to the next month, with no expiration. They are yours forever.
Do you offer enterprise pricing or plans for teams?
Yes, we offer customized pricing for enterprise customers or teams with large-scale needs. Please contact us at support@magichour.ai to discuss your requirements.
Does the pricing include tax?
Pricing excludes tax. If we legally need to collect tax, it will be added at the point of payment with Stripe. If we do not currently charge tax in your country or region, and in the future need to, then this will be added to your recurring bill at that time.
How do I cancel my subscription?
You can easily cancel your subscription any time in your My Plan page. After canceling, your subscription will end at the end of your billing cycle, and you will not be charged again.
How do I get more credits?

As a free user, you get an initial one-time 400 credits. Each day you visit the Create page, you can also claim an additional 100 free credits regardless of your plan.

As a paid subscriber, you receive a monthly credit allowance that gives you wider flexibility to use Magic Hour's premium features at your own pace. Importantly, these credits replenish at the beginning of each billing period and will never expire, so you can always save them for when your usage needs increase.

How do I remove watermarks?
You can remove watermarks by purchasing a subscription or credit pack.
What happens if I run out of credits in my paid plan?

When you run out of credits, you have three options:

You can wait for your next billing cycle to start. You can see when your next billing cycle starts in Next Invoice in My Plan.
You can purchase credit packs, which are one-time credit purchases in Pricing. This allows you to "top up" your plan whenever you run out.
You can start a new plan. If you switch from a monthly plan to an annual plan or vice-versa, the plan will start immediately. If you switch from a monthly plan to a different monthly plan or an annual plan to a different annual plan, your plan will start at the end of your billing cycle. However, if you want to start it immediately, you can click Upgrade Now in My Plan.
What happens to my credits if I downgrade my plan?
If you downgrade your plan, you will keep all the credits you have, but your monthly allowance will adjust to your new plan's limit at the start of your next billing cycle.
What payment methods do you accept?

We accept credit cards and debit cards worldwide, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, Diners Club, JCB, and China UnionPay.

We accept other payment options depending on your country and region, including:

Wallets: Apple Pay, Cash App Pay, Google Pay, Amazon Pay, Link, Alipay, WeChat Pay
Bank Redirects: Bancontact, EPS, giropay, iDEAL, Prszelewy24
Buy Now, Pay Later: Affirm, Afterpay/Clearpay, Klarna

We do not accept PayPal.

What support is included with my subscription?

All users have access to email and live chat support. Paid subscribers receive priority support, with responses typically within 3 hours during business hours (Pacific Time).

We aim to respond to all other requests within 24 hours. If there's a delay, we might be offline - thanks for your patience while we catch some sleep.

Our Mission

Magic Hour was born from a simple problem: video creation is hard, and most people never start. We wanted to change that.

The idea was inspired by helping my parents create videos for their hot pot business. Sometimes it took me up to a day to ideate, shoot, and edit a video. When tools like Stable Diffusion came out, I started hacking together ways to generate videos.

What began as a side project turned into something bigger. By posting videos from early versions of Magic Hour, we reached over 200 million people on social.

Our mission with Magic Hour is to take what we've experienced and give it to as many people as possible, so anyone can turn their ideas into economic opportunity.

Our Story

We met in 1997 in China when our moms, who were college roommates and are best friends, introduced us. Our families both immigrated to the US and ended up in Pennsylvania, where we spent time together growing up.

After college, David became a Software Engineer and Runbo became a Data Scientist. In 2023, Runbo asked David to help him productize his AI video prototypes, and soon, Magic Hour was born.

Magic Hour is born out of our experiences helping our parents market their small businesses, where we learned how difficult it is to create engaging video content, and our time in tech building apps for millions of creators, consumers, and gamers.

Want to work with us?

We'd love to hear from you!

General FAQ
Is Magic Hour free to use?
We offer 400 credits for free so you can get to know Magic Hour and create your first videos or images. To create additional content beyond the 400 credits, subscribe to our Creator, Pro, or Business plan or purchase a credit pack.
How many credits do I need?
As a rule of thumb, take the seconds of video you want and multiply it by its FPS (frames per second). A good starting point is 12 FPS for Animations, 24 FPS for Face Swap and Lip Sync, and 30 FPS for Text-to-Video and Image-to-Video.
Can I use my videos for commercial purposes?

If you're a paid user, the videos you create are yours, and you hold full commercial rights.

Free users do not have commercial rights and may only use generated videos for personal, non-commercial purposes.

What is a credit?

Credits are your currency on Magic Hour. They're deducted from your balance as you create images and videos.

For some modes, we charge more because they're more computationally expensive.

When you're creating an image or video, we will always tell you exactly how many credits the generation will cost before you click render.

Do my credits roll over each month?
Yes, your credits roll over each month and you will always have access to them. Note that your access to features however is determined by your subscription tier.
Pricing
Are my generations private?

Yes, your generations are private from other users and Magic Hour. We will never access any of your assets without your explicit permission. You have the option to delete the generated asset after completion from our system. Make sure to download it first if you'd like to keep it, as it's deleted forever.

Assets that you upload to our platform, including images, audio, and videos are also private and are deleted within one week.

Can I use my plan for API access?

It's designed for creators, marketers, and anyone who wants to make eye-catching content without animation skills.

The tool uses AI models trained on large animation and image datasets to generate a series of frames based on your input prompt. These frames are then stitched into a smooth, looping GIF. The process is fully automated and typically takes less than a minute.
What formats can I download the GIF in?
By default, your animation is available as a standard GIF file. Paid users can also export as high-quality MP4 for better compression and social media compatibility. All files are optimized for sharing on platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and Discord.
Can I upload an image to guide the animation?
Not yet. The AI GIF generator currently creates GIFs from text prompts only. Image-to-GIF support may be added in the future.
What kind of prompts work best?
Clear, descriptive prompts with visual detail tend to produce the best results. For example, “a robot dancing under neon lights in anime style” will yield better results than just “robot dancing.” You can also add style cues like “3D,” “pixel art,” or “cinematic lighting” for more control.
What styles can I create with the AI GIF Generator?
You can generate GIFs in a wide range of styles, including anime, cinematic, pixel art, sketch, digital painting, and more. The tool will continue to evolve with new style presets and prompt-based fine-tuning, making it easier to match your aesthetic.

Magic Hour is one of the best free AI headshot generators. It works with one photo, requires no sign up, and delivers professional headshots in seconds. Unlike many tools that need 6-12 photos or a paid plan, you can create headshots for free online with no credit card. Ideal for LinkedIn, resumes, and team pages.

Simply upload a clear selfie, and our AI will automatically enhance, refine, and generate a professional-quality headshot. Using advanced image processing, the tool applies background removal, lighting adjustments, and facial enhancements to create a polished and realistic result. In just a few seconds, you'll receive a high-resolution headshot ideal for professional profiles, resumes, social media, and more - no need for an expensive studio photoshoot!
How do I regenerate my headshot if I'm not satisfied?
Simply click regenerate or upload another photo and create another headshot for free! You can keep creating headshots until you're fully satisfied with your output.
What kind of image should I use?
You should use an image that has a clear shot of your face with no obstructions. It should also resemble you, be high resolution, and not include multiple people.
Why use an AI headshot generator?
An AI headshot generator can create a professional headshot in about 30 seconds for free - compared to hundreds of dollars and hours of your time for a photographer.

Fourth, download your favorite result or refine with a new prompt. No account is required for the first 10 images per day.

Can I use Magic Hour’s AI images for commercial projects?
Yes - if you’re a paid user. Commercial usage covers marketing, websites, product designs, merchandise, and more, with no royalties or attribution required. Free users are limited to personal use only. As always, avoid infringing trademarks, copyrighted characters, or brands.
Do I own my AI-generated images?
Yes. All images generated with Magic Hour belong entirely to you and can be used for personal or commercial projects. We make no copyright claims, but check your local laws as AI copyright regulations vary by region.
How does Magic Hour ensure the safe use of its AI image generator?
We automatically screen prompts to block inappropriate content and provide guidelines for ethical use. Users can also report issues to help maintain a safe and positive community.
Are there any limitations to what the AI can generate?
AI excels with clear, specific prompts but may struggle with highly abstract ideas or contradictory instructions. The more precise your description, the better your results. Practice and iteration improve outcomes significantly.
Can I edit or modify my AI-generated images?
Yes. You can refine images by regenerating variations with new prompts, or edit them for free in our AI Image Editor. You can also download images for use in any design software, allowing you to use traditional editing techniques.
How can I ensure my AI-generated images align with my brand?
Include brand-specific details in your prompts, such as colors, style, and tone (e.g., 'minimalist design in blue and white with a modern tech feel'). Save effective prompts to ensure consistency across all your visuals.
How do I generate an image from text?
Type your prompt into the text field and click 'Generate.' Our AI instantly transforms your description into multiple images. Once generated, you can download your favorites in high resolution and share them directly from the platform.
How do I write a great prompt for AI image generation?
A good prompt is clear and specific and covers subject, style, and details. For example: 'A serene mountain lake at sunset, impressionist style, dramatic lighting.' Structures like 'Subject + Setting + Lighting + Style + Quality' work well. Experiment with both short and detailed prompts to find the best results. See our [AI prompting guide](/blog/how-to-prompt-ai-videos-a-simple-guide) for examples.
Why use an AI image generator, and what projects is it best for?
AI image generators turn ideas into visuals quickly, removing the need for design skills or long production times. They’re perfect for social media graphics, marketing campaigns, blogs, presentations, storyboards, and quick prototyping of creative concepts.

The AI reads your prompt and analyzes the chosen meme template to generate a caption that fits the format and tone. It draws on patterns from internet culture, trending memes, and humor data to craft something that feels relevant and entertaining. The entire process takes just seconds.
How do I create memes from text with AI?
Use our AI meme generator: pick a meme template, type your idea or topic in the text box, and click generate. The AI turns your text into a funny caption that fits the format. Download or share your meme instantly.
How do I generate memes using AI?
Pick a meme template and write a short prompt describing what the meme should be about. The AI will generate a funny or relevant caption based on your input. You can edit the caption if you like, then download or share the meme instantly - no design skills required.
How do I make a good meme?
Pick a well-known meme template and write a prompt that captures a relatable, ironic, or exaggerated scenario. The best memes are simple, surprising, and emotionally resonant - whether they're funny, frustrating, or painfully true. Let the AI do the rest.
How is this meme generator different from others?
Most meme generators require you to write your own captions. Ours uses AI to turn a simple prompt into a funny, context-aware caption that fits a popular meme format. It lowers the barrier to creativity and makes meme creation faster, easier, and more fun.
Why use an AI meme generator?

What is a QR code?
A QR code (Quick Response Code) is a type of barcode that can store a wide variety of data, like URLs, which can be quickly scanned using a smartphone camera. Our AI-generated QR codes take this basic technology to the next level by turning your QR codes into personalized, artistic designs that reflect your brand or creative vision.

An AI QR code art generator creates artistic QR codes from any link or text. Instead of plain black and white codes, you get QR code art with custom styles - watercolor, minimal, retro, and more. Our free AI QR code generator turns any URL into scannable QR code artwork in seconds.

First, try zooming your camera in and out and left and right. Then, try re-generating your QR code. Lastly, check the data you entered for accuracy, and ensure you're using a reliable QR code scanner app.

Is my photo data stored or reused?
No. Uploaded photos are processed securely and deleted shortly after use. We don't store your images for training or share them with any third parties. Your content remains private and protected.
Can I use colorized photos for commercial projects?

What is an image colorizer?
An image colorizer is an AI tool that adds realistic color to black and white or faded photos. Magic Hour's free image colorizer analyzes objects, faces, and context to infer natural-looking tones. You can colorize photos free online with a single upload - no sign up required.
What is the Photo Colorizer?
The Photo Colorizer is our image colorizer that takes black and white or faded photos and automatically adds realistic colors using AI. It analyzes the objects, faces, and context in the image to infer natural-looking tones. This makes it easy to revive old memories and bring historical photos to life with a single upload.
How does the Photo Colorizer work?
The tool uses deep learning models trained on millions of images to predict accurate colors for grayscale photos. It identifies objects, people, and settings to apply realistic hues - like skin tones, sky, or clothing - while preserving fine details. The process is fully automated and takes just a few seconds.
What file types are supported?
We support JPG, PNG, and WebP formats. If your image is in another format like TIFF or BMP, use a free converter before uploading. For best results, upload clear, high-quality images at 512x512 resolution or higher.
Can I fine-tune the colors after colorization?
Not yet. The current version focuses on fully automatic results for speed and simplicity. If you're looking for more customization, you can use our photo editing tools to adjust the style or make enhancements afterward.
How can I enlarge old photos without losing details?
Use the AI Image Upscaler, which enhances resolution up to 4x while preserving detail. It's designed to retain textures, facial features, and sharpness. This is useful for printing, archiving, or sharing restored images online. It works especially well after colorizing your photo.
What kinds of photos work best?
The image colorizer performs best on clear, well-lit black and white portraits or outdoor scenes. Photos with recognizable objects and faces typically produce the most accurate colorizations. Blurry, heavily damaged, or abstract images may still work, but with less consistent results.
Why retouch an old portrait with Magic Hour's Photo Colorizer?
Color brings emotion and realism back to old portraits. Our AI enhances skin tones, background colors, and fine details to make the image feel alive again. It's an easy way to reconnect with family history or give new life to old memories. The results are often striking, even with minimal effort.

AI generation is 10-20x faster and 5-10x cheaper than traditional creators who charge $100-500 per video with 1-2 week turnarounds, allowing you to generate unlimited variations in minutes for rapid testing and scaling.
What languages are supported?
We support 40+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin, Hindi, and Arabic. All avatars maintain natural lip-sync and pronunciation across every language.

E-commerce products, SaaS apps, digital services, supplements, beauty products, fashion, and online courses perform exceptionally well. Testimonials, product demos, and problem-solution narratives see the highest engagement and ROI.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI video generator work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Magic Hour's AI video generator supports multiple workflows: type a text prompt to generate a video from scratch (text-to-video), upload a photo to animate it (image-to-video), restyle existing footage (video-to-video), or create stop-motion animations. mainEntity.name: Can I generate images with AI on Magic Hour?

mainEntity.name: How does the face swap video tool work?

You can also swap faces in photos, GIFs, and multi-person group shots, all for free.

visual_data.visual_style_notes: Dark, cinematic AI-tool branding with a minimalist premium feel. Heavy use of black space, soft navy gradients, and a vivid neon-purple CTA creates strong contrast. Visuals lean futuristic and slightly magical, with glossy product-card imagery and subtle glow effects. The brand feels like a high-end creative AI platform rather than a playful consumer app.
visual_data.layout_style: Sparse hero-led layout with large negative space, right-aligned feature imagery, centered or offset headline blocks, and a dense multi-column footer. Navigation is clean and top-aligned; content uses strong hierarchy, oversized typography, and isolated CTA placement.
visual_data.imagery_style: photo-heavy with glossy card/mockup composites and occasional surreal or AI-generated scene imagery
